originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Rewriting CARBS Hyperparameter Sweeps with Normalization Fixes for RL
summary: Worked on rewriting the CARBS hyperparameter sweep algorithm for reinforcement learning, focusing on data normalization, boundary conditions, and scoring functions. Tested on synthetic tasks and Pong, showing improvements in Pareto front coverage and reducing wasted experiments.
